closed_form_equation_v73.feature_term: K_f_v73 = K_f_v72 + K_f_v72 * A_break * 0.004 + K_f_v72 * B_plastic_v17 * 0.001 + K_f_v72 * D_feature_v11 * 0.001
closed_form_equation_v73.structure_term: K_s_v73 = K_s_v72 + K_s_v72 * G_struct_break * 0.007 + K_s_v72 * B_struct_v17 * 0.004 + K_s_v72 * D_structure_v11 * 0.002
closed_form_equation_v73.learning_term: K_l_v73 = K_l_v72 + K_l_v72 * R_train_v17 + M_break * 1000 + A_break * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v11 * 1000

project_readout.summary: 第七十三版主核开始把破平台探针、脑编码第十一版直测链和训练终式第十七桥一起并回主核，使主核开始直接回答“平台期会不会松动”。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把这条主核推进到更大的可训练系统里，检验平台期是否真的开始松动。
